text: Before I just like update my ports every 1-2 week and, look like one of realize somebody do one commit without installer folder PREFIX='' or WRKDIRPREFIX=''this is only a guess, it broke my system, when 10.1 is out I try new fresh reinstall, but "bug" still exit and I think need trap or verification, better "segmentation fault core dumped", than kernel panic and reboot.
